deviations.description: The process model enforces that both 'Perform Physical Examination' and 'Draw Blood Samples' (blood test) precede 'Make Diagnosis', while the new requirement only permits a diagnosis without requiring these prior activities. The process is stricter than the new requirement.
process_model_reference: Perform Physical Examination, Draw Blood Samples, Make Diagnosis

deviations.description: The process model enforces that 'Perform Physical Examination' must precede 'Make Diagnosis', but the new requirement only permits a diagnosis without requiring this order. The process is stricter than the new requirement.

The process model enforces that 'Draw Blood Samples' (blood test) must precede 'Make Diagnosis', but the new requirement only permits a diagnosis without requiring this order. The process is stricter than the new requirement.
